reviews.review_description: Fun game but on Aussie course I was in bounds on the 15th hole and for some unknown reason it set me waaaaaay out of bounds on the other side of a rock cliff and would not let me play back to the green. I would hit the ball & it would hit an invisible barrier and bounce back. Had to quit the game at the 15th hole. Kind of a bummer as it was my best game so far & I was playing someone else.

I tried out and played Golf+ AND Golf 5, (which are both way more expensive) yet for me this was the one I enjoyed the most. I like the feel, the mechanics.  I like that it picks the best club for you but if you want you can pick your own. I love the light beam over the hole that let's you know what direction your aiming for.They have made it  user friendly but also challenging when your ready. I'm still new to it but can tell already I'll be coming back again and again. The courses are beautiful to play. I hope it just keeps growing and improving and I hope it gets all the credit it deserves.

Unfortunately, this app does not allow for any settings to correct for misalignment in club attachments. I use the AMVR club, but this is not contained in the presets, and there is no way to adjust the angle or position of the club like in EVERY other golf app. ￼￼Means it's unplayable for me.

developer_response.body: Hi, the game does support several golf club attachments available in the settings which can be adjusted forward and back based on length. However at this point, not all extension clubs are supported such as the angled ones. Typically extension handles where the controller is pointing straight should be ok and when you are on the course press forward and back on the thumbstick to adjust position.

reviews.review_description: Price is awesome I love the water falls at night.  my only complaint is I can't get my golf club to work no matter what I try it's upside down. Creator is their anyway to solve this problem? My club is the deadeye vr any help would be greatly appreciated. Even if not possible still a great game thanks!

developer_response.body: Hey, glad you are enjoying the game. The game supports a few different extension handles which can be seen from the settings in the front desk of the game. One of them is the deadeye vr, however it could be an earlier model they manufactured. You can view the picture to see if it looks the same as yours.

reviews.review_description: I see the Quest 2 version as an option, will the Quest 3 version be supported? I think this game plays well and would love to use the DeadEye golf club attachment with it like I can with Golf+ and Golf 5.
Nice layout, good graphics needs improvement on putting feel ie ball speed to putter contact.

reviews.review_title: Best Golf game out of all my golf apps
reviews.review_description:
I clearly remember purchasing this same game from my Oculus Go.  Unfortunately, it was no longer available on the Quest at the time. Correct me if I'm wrong but I'm pretty sure this was the same app.

I'm so happy it's now available on the Quest as this used to be my favorite game on the Oculus GO.  Best graphics and it feels very realistic.. I can't wait to use it tomorrow morning
I am absolutely loving this game, would love to see more maps being added on !!

Liking the colorful environment and features. Holding the trigger means not hitting it by accident as much. I had to up the green speed - default looks and rolls a lot like short shag rug. Every VR golf needs a clubhouse this nice to have mixed reality martinis in when your arm is tired.

reviews.review_title: Does not support the vr golf grip
reviews.review_description: Seems ok but it does not support the vr golf grip accessory model Q3GP1

developer_response.body: Hi, the game description does not mention support for extension handles however we have included presets for a number of them and you can also customise the settings for the majority of others by selecting the "No Trigger" option in settings and then adjusting the length of the clubs in the game. Compatibility though will depend on the design of the handle.

reviews.review_description: I purchased this game as was given a Quest 1, unable to play 18 hole courses on any other golf game. This is fun. I love the way you can change length of club so you don't have to move. Great for playing in tight places. Multiplayer is great, a friend mine purchased game so we can play online.  Having a little trouble putting as I don't seem to be able to bring up information on slop etc. Please don't stop  full game from working on Q1.

developer_response.body: Hi, Glad you are enjoying the game. When on the green, click the thumbstick to bring up the slope information.

reviews.review_description:
i believe the positive reviews are from people who arent low handicapers. i can tell you the distance is way off. its over 100 yards short. you dont move the ball forward of back in your stance for trajectory, you simply press a button. the graphics arent the best and the clubs are far from realistic. if you could adjust your distance to your normal game it wouldnt be as bad but when you go from 330 to 200 off the tee, that alone is enough to want to break your oculus. putting and chipping is realistic. outside of that, its far from being considered an accurate golf simulator. it will ruin your golf swing if youre a competition player and you get used to this. id steer clear. for kids and nongolfers who want to see how it feels to play golf, i recommend it. for any players who would use the app for a swing analysis breakdown or different angles of
attack, this is not the app for you.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback.  Graphics keep improving as each course is released with the island courses the most recent including photo scanned assets. For  adjusting distance, you can use the power setting so if you are hitting the ball too short or far based on your real life swing, adjust this up or down until you get the right feel and distance.  This setting then saves per club. The game tries to strike a balance for the majority of players and there are actually a lot of real life golfers who play the game and have commented on the similarity to their own game. More features are planned based on all the feedback we receive. I would also caution against using any vr golf game to improve your swing. The weight is a huge factor and heavy use of the lightweight controllers will cause issues out on the real course. Extension handles do help however the weight distribution also is an important factor. One thing you can gain from them however is improving your placement/strategy.

reviews.review_description:
Update October 8 2021

Don't wait.  You are going to have so much fun on this course and the newly added inspired clubhouse pushes my rating from 4 to 5 stars.    Perfection is a journey and these guys are on the path...constantly tweaking and improving.  They don't make it easy..but the developers are very responsive. 




Update: September 18. 

Since I wrote the previous  review there have been updates that fixed the multi-player issues I mentioned, along with other bugs,  added new spiffy clubs (love the putter) and changed the look of the course a bit,  enriching the trees, grass and greens.  On the tee boxes there is now  a giant screen for watching player tee shots, a permanent board showing the layout   and walkable bridges.   This unique environment feels very much like a lush and challenging mountain course you might wish to find tucked away  along a rocky coastline. It has elevations,   water hazards and  oh my..the wind.  Yeah. Golfers ..you want this.  

----------------------------

First..a shout out to the developers for adding multi-player recently.  Now, I am a duffer so this is not a Pro Review.   In have only had the game a couple of weeks so I expect to be in  amatuer mode for awhile.   I adjust my vr clubs to my real life distance levels so I don't get too  confident. ...and it works!  Putting though is wonky and I don't know why.  Resetting the floor in the guardian helped  the putter actually meet the ball..but only if the club is very short. If I adjust the club to my height..it won't meet the ball.  
   This is a beautiful and challenging course. The sand and roughs play a bit easy whlle the greens can be tricky.  Again..in amatuer mode.     But It, It is such a restful setting I find myself delaying game play to  explore. Sounds of rushing water and birds,  lush canyons...ocean shore..delicate pines and a cave.  I hope eventually the environment will be further developed to allow more exploration..I want to stand on those charming bridges and wander about hidden paths.  Unfortunately when in multi-player mode the guest player is unable to teleport so we can't explore together.  Maybe this can be fixed? I would also like to see more full bodied avatars added.  And let's talk about that minute break  the game gives  you for a rest stop.  Sometimes that trip takes a bit longer so maybe up to 3 minutes? Just sayn'. 
  But what about the golf?  I have other golf apps. This one has the 18 hole  full club option they do not.  I agree with other reviewer's raves about this course and..who doesn't like an option to play on the moon?  The scoreboard  tracks  everything you do...it is going to make you feel so professional 😉.   And I can't wait to fiind out if there is a plan to develop the clubhouse.  I have already run my Oculus to black playing here. Buy this now..it is totally worth every cent and the developers deserve  to be  supported.   Love this world...think I'll.hang out on the beach for awhile and then visit the moon! I am sure I will 5 star at some point.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the review - glad you are enjoying the game and the recent updates.

reviews.review_title: Early days for me but wow!
reviews.review_description: I've played so many golf games on pc and console and all were disappointing!  This is the golf game this 59 year old gamer and golfer has been waiting for. Yes it's not perfect but apparently being developed all the time. Just played my first round and getting a feel for the play, hit 79 on the front nine and 50 on the back. I have to say for me, it's the next best thing to getting out and playing for real!

I've played every console golf game over the years and can honestly say this is the most realistic and immersive.
Also, join the discord and you can actually chat with the developer and make suggestions, it's the friendliest discord full of good people.

just to show I'm not a bot or somethin... I'm Marky745 in the discord.

Try this game 👍😎👍

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review - glad you are enjoying the game and joined the discord club.

reviews.review_description: Only full bag game out in vr I found. Glitchy as all hell but with new versions to come, the fixs will happen to fine tune the UI.  Got a ball stuck in the right hand ocean area on the 18th and had to wait 2 or 3 mins for the ball to stop. I like the club head control, very realistic. Add real courses and we may have fire.. Keep it up

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review. Online Multiplayer and more courses are the main focus as well as continual improvements from player suggestions. That ball rolling around on the rock in the ocean on 18th is fixed btw in the next release due out in a few days. Cheers

reviews.review_description: Just bought this app and everytime I  click on the icon to launch it goes black and then back to oculus home screen. Why is this happening?! I either want this resolving ASAP or a refund

developer_response.body: Hi Steve, the app is working for everyone else so it must be something local to your headset. There are a few things to try such as uninstalling the game, restarting your headset, making sure you have the latest updates on the phone and headset, enough storage and then reinstalling. If you are still having an issue you will need to contact Oculus so they can resolve it for you. This is the link to log a support ticket with them https://tickets.oculusvr.com/hc/en-us/requests/new

reviews.review_description: I know this has been around for a while now but it still feels like just the start of a good golf game. I didn't read all the description and discovered in game that it doesn't have online multiplayer. That's a big let down and I probably won't play it again unless multiplayer is added
Good

I'm really liking this game. It's not perfect....yet, but the developer is actively improving it and there's a growing Discord channel where ideas and suggestions are discussed. It's only just been released on AppLab (March 2021) so hopefully that will bring in more revenue so the developers can continue to improve it.

It's great being able to play proper golf swings in your living room. You really get immersed in the game and feel like you're on a real course. Little touches like the hole explorer (being able to fly over the course) are great!

I think this is currently the only proper  golf simulation on the Quest. Mini golf is fine and there are options for that elsewhere, but this is real golf... driving, chipping, putting, frustration!
